targets.boundary: This carbon inventory reflects what is in scope for the carbon negative commitment, including global Scope 1, Scope 2 (market-based), and relevant Scope 3 categories.
targets.notes: Carbon negative by 2030 and by 2050 remove from the atmosphere an equivalent amount of all the carbon dioxide emitted directly or by electricity consumption since 1975.
targets.title: Carbon negative by 2030 and historical carbon removal by 2050

targets.notes: Plan to reduce Scope 1 and 2 (market-based) emissions to near zero by increasing energy efficiency, decarbonizing operations, and reaching 100% direct renewable electricity by 2025.
targets.title: Reduce Scope 1 and 2 emissions to near zero by 2030

targets.boundary: Scope 3 emissions (market-based and per management’s criteria).
targets.notes: Aim to reduce Scope 3 emissions (market-based and management’s criteria) by more than half by 2030 with 2020 as the baseline year.
targets.title: Reduce Scope 3 emissions by more than half by 2030

targets.boundary: Global Scope 1, Scope 2 market-based, and Scope 3 business air travel emissions within the carbon neutrality boundary.
targets.notes: Target to be carbon neutral every year since FY13 by matching emissions within the carbon neutrality boundary with an equivalent amount of carbon credits.
targets.title: Annual carbon neutrality from FY13 onward

targets.notes: Committed in 2020 to being a carbon negative, water positive, and zero waste company by 2030.
targets.title: Carbon negative, water positive, and zero waste by 2030
